# cap-alert



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property      | Attribute     | Description                       | Type                                                        | Default     |
| ------------- | ------------- | --------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `dismissible` | `dismissible` | Show a dismiss (×) button         | `boolean`                                                   | `false`     |
| `heading`     | `heading`     | Bold title line above the message | `string`                                                    | `''`        |
| `variant`     | `variant`     | Visual style                      | `"danger" \| "default" \| "info" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `'default'` |


## Events

| Event        | Description                                | Type                |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------------ | ------------------- |
| `capDismiss` | Emitted when the dismiss button is clicked | `CustomEvent<void>` |
